creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 180230
DEPRECATE graphics/{open,qt}gtl

OpenGTL appeared to be dead upstream when I patched it to build with LLVM 3.3 a year and a half ago. When Calligra was updated to 2.9 in Dec 2015, there was no longer any consumer of QtGtl, and QtGtl is the only consumer of OpenGTL, so both have been useless for over a year. The domain no longer resolves so I don't think these are coming back and the version of LLVM they work with is EOL.
